news.headline: Mining company FQM raises $1 billion in senior notes offering.
Borr Drilling Limited declares $0.02 per share cash distribution for Q4 2024 to shareholders of record on March 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on February 19, 2025, Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a cash distribution of paid-in capital amounting to US$0.02 per share for the last quarter of 2024. This distribution will be given to shareholders listed on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: Coeur Mining, Inc. reports Q4 2024 revenue of $305M, $64M cash flow, and $38M net income from continuing operations.
news.summary: In Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. disclosed its fourth-quarter 2024 financial outcomes today. The report includes revenue totaling $305 million and $64 million in cash flow from operational activities. The Company recorded GAAP net income from continuing operations at $38 million, equivalent to $0.08 per share. In adjusted figures, Coeur reported an EBITDA of $116 million, $79 million in cash flow from operating activities before adjustments in working capital, and net income from cont.

news.headline: Valaris reported Q4 2024 results with fleetwide revenue efficiency of 96%. Safety awards achieved in 2024.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Valaris Limited (NYSE: VAL) revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. CEO Anton Dibowitz stated that the company maintained strong operational and financial performance, attaining a fleetwide revenue efficiency of 96% in Q4 and 97% for the entire year. Additionally, Valaris excelled in safety in 2024, receiving safety accolades from the IADC and the Center.

news.headline: American States Water Company (NYSE:AWR) reports Q4 2024 EPS of $0.75, up from $0.55 in Q4 2023, citing an increase of $0.20 per share.
news.summary: In San Dimas, California, American States Water Company (NYSE:AWR) announced their quarterly results for the period ending December 31, 2024. They reported a rise in diluted earnings per share from $0.55 in the same period of 2023 to $0.75 in 2024, marking a $0.20 increase per share. This change was influenced by the final decision in the electric general rate case that was implemented in the fourth quarter of 2024. The decision led to retroactive new rates applied for the entirety of 2023 and the subsequent year.

news.headline: Lincoln Electric Board declares $0.75 quarterly dividend per share. Payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Cleveland-based company Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.75 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on April 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. Lincoln Electric is a prominent player in the global market for advanced arc welding solutions, automated joining, assembly, and cutting systems, plasma and oxy-fuel cutting equipment, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: RYAM to release Q4 2024 earnings on March 5, 2025. Conference call on March 6 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Visit www.RYAM.com for more info.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Rayonier Advanced Materials (NYSE: RYAM) is set to announce its fourth quarter 2024 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. A conference call and live webcast to discuss these results will be held at 9:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, March 6, 2025. Interested parties can find supplemental materials and access the live audio webcast at www.RYAM.com. A replay of the webcast will also be available on the company’s website shortly after the call. Investors are encouraged to participate in this event.

news.headline: Nordson Corp. reports $615M in sales for Q1 2025 (down from $633M), with net income of $95M and earnings per share of $1.65.
news.summary: Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) released its fiscal first quarter results ended on January 31, 2025. Sales for the quarter stood at $615 million, showing a decrease from the previous year's first quarter sales of $633 million. The sales for Q1 2025 were boosted by an 8% positive impact from acquisitions but were partially offset by a 9% decrease in organic sales and a 2% negative impact due to currency translation. Net income for the quarter was $95 million, resulting in $1.65 earnings per diluted share, in contrast to the previous year's first quarter.

news.headline: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. reported full year 2024 net earnings of $1.22B and adjusted EBITDA of $2.28B.
news.summary: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), a key global producer of hydrogen and nitrogen products, has released its financial results for the full year and fourth quarter as of December 31, 2024. The highlights include net earnings of $1.22 billion, equal to $6.74 per diluted share, EBITDA of $2.33 billion, and adjusted EBITDA of $2.28 billion for the full year 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, net earnings amounted to $328 million, or $1.89 per diluted share, with EBITDA of $582 million.

news.headline: Syntheia Corp. signs first enterprise deal with Van-Fort Ontario to use AI agent for Nunavut Help Desk.
news.summary: In Toronto, Syntheia Corp. (CSE: SYAI), a prominent provider of conversational AI solutions for managing inbound telephone calls, has secured its initial commercial enterprise deal with Van-Fort Ontario. The agreement entails utilizing Syntheia for their Nunavut Help Desk project, with AssistantNLP serving as the primary agent for fielding inbound calls from around 300 government employees.

news.headline: Stock markets rise with Dow Jones up, S&P 500 at new high post release of Fed minutes. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Following the release of the Fed minutes, there was an increase in the major indexes. The Dow Jones saw a rise as the S&P 500 closed at a new high. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: American Water reports Q4 2024 earnings of $1.22/share, up from $0.88/share in 2023. Full year earnings in 2024 were $5.39/share, up from $4.90/share in 2023. CEO to retire in May.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced their fourth quarter 2024 earnings at $1.22 per share, a notable increase from $0.88 per share in 2023. The full year earnings for 2024 were reported at $5.39 per share, up from $4.90 per share in 2023. The company expressed satisfaction in achieving industry-leading earnings and dividend growth. A significant investment of $3.3 billion was made in regulated operations in 2024, primarily focused on infrastructure renewal.

news.headline: Commerce Agency plans to dismiss a large number of chip and AI employees.
Kaiser Aluminum Corp releases 2024 Q4 and FY financial findings.
Host Hotels & Resorts reports $1.5 billion acquisitions, 2.1% RevPAR growth, $900 million net senior notes issuance in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, acquisitions totaling $1.5 billion were successfully finalized. Throughout the full year, there was a 2.1% growth in Comparable Hotel Total RevPAR. Furthermore, a balanced maturity schedule was achieved by issuing $900 million in senior notes during the year.

The event is anticipated to attract significant attention with industry experts gathering to hear about the company's insights and strategic plans.

news.headline: Ultragenyx grants 23,760 stock units to 10 non-executive officers on Feb. 16, 2025, for new employment inducement.
news.summary: On February 16, 2025, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) granted 23,760 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to 10 newly hired non-executive officers. The awards were approved by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan. This grant date was considered an important inducement for the new employees entering into employment with Ultragenyx in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Olema Oncology, a biopharmaceutical company focused on breast cancer, to present at TD Cowen conference on March 5 at 10:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in San Francisco, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: OLMA), a company specializing in developing targeted therapies for breast cancer and other conditions, shared news that their President and CEO, Sean P. Bohen, M.D., Ph.D., is scheduled to speak at the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 5, 2025. The presentation is set for 10:30 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. reported $2.40 net investment income per share in Q4 2024, with $0.42 base dividend & $0.15 special dividend per share declared. NAV per share at $19.98 as of Dec. 31, 2024.
news.summary: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCAP) based in Los Angeles, disclosed its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company reported a net investment income of $2.40 per share and net income of $1.99 per share for this period. In the fourth quarter of 2024, net investment income and net income per share were $0.55 and $0.27, respectively. The net asset value (NAV) per share stood at $19.98 as of December 31, 2024. The Board of Directors declared a regular cash dividend of $0.42 per share for the first quarter of 2025, payable on April 15, 2025, to stockholders of record as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, special cash dividends of $0.15 per share will be paid in three equal quarterly installments of $0.05 per share, related to undistributed taxable income.

news.headline: Old Point Financial Corp sets $0.14 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 28, 2025 to shareholders as of March 5.

This dividend will be distributed on March 28, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 5, 2025. It is noteworthy that this amount matches the dividend paid out in the previous quarter.

news.headline: Toshitaka Oiwa and Hiroyuki Oshida appointed CEO and CFO of Core BTS effective March 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on February 19, 2025, Core BTS disclosed that Toshitaka Oiwa will take the reins as Chief Executive Officer, while Hiroyuki Oshida will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer starting March 1. This move marks a significant change in leadership for the full-service digital transformation consulting firm, with Oiwa and Oshida being tasked with leading the company forward in its operations.

These contracts involve the utilization and licensing of MDWerks' exclusive Spirits Rapid Aging System. MDWerks, noted as a forward-looking entity in sustainable technology, operates under the ticker symbol OTCQB: MDWK.

news.headline: Ball Corporation to present at Bank of America 2025 Conference as the top sustainable aluminum packaging provider.
news.summary: The global provider of sustainable aluminum packaging, Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL), based in Westminster, Colo., is set to participate in the Bank of America 2025 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 19th. With a focus on offering packaging solutions for beverages, personal care, and home care products, Ball Corporation plays a significant role in promoting sustainability.

news.headline: Southwest Gas Holdings declares $0.62 per share dividend for Q2 2025 payable on June 2, 2025.

The dividend for Common Stock is set at $0.62 per share, payable on June 2, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2025. This dividend represents...

news.headline: Owens & Minor shares drop after mixed Q4 results and $310M Apria goodwill charge. Planning to raise debt for Rotech buyout.
news.summary: Shares of Owens & Minor, Inc. (NYSE:OMI) saw a drop in premarket trading following the release of preliminary results and financing details for their planned acquisition of Rotech Healthcare Holdings, Inc. The President & CEO, Edward A. Pesicka, confirmed that they are looking to secure additional debt financing to fund the buyout, which is anticipated to be completed in the first half of 2025. Pesicka highlighted the company's strong free cash flow that will support the financing and aid in achieving their debt reduction targets in the coming years. Owens & Minor had initially revealed the Rotech acquisition in July 2024.

news.headline: Carvana reports Q4 revenue of $3.55B, beats EPS estimate at 56 cents, up 46% YoY. Sold 114,379 vehicles.
news.summary: Carvana Co (NYSE:CVNA) released its Q4 financial results after market close with impressive numbers to note. The fourth-quarter revenue stood at a whopping $3.55 billion, surpassing the anticipated $3.31 billion. Earnings per share for Q4 were at 56 cents, exceeding the projected 21 cents per share by analysts as reported by Benzinga Pro. Total revenue witnessed a colossal 46% increase year-over-year. The company managed to sell 114,379 vehicles in the fourth quarter, marking a significant 50% surge compared to the previous year. Net income amounted to $159 million. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cleveland-Cliffs expects Q4 revenue miss at $4.3 billion & EBITDA loss of $85 million, crediting Trump’s tariffs for future growth.
news.summary: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) saw a decline in shares on Monday following the release of their preliminary results. For the fourth quarter of 2024, the company is projecting steel shipments to be 3.8 million net tons, generating revenues of approximately $4.30 billion compared to the expected $4.49 billion. The adjusted EBITDA loss for the quarter is estimated to be $85 million. Looking ahead to the full year 2024, Cleveland-Cliffs expects steel shipments to reach 15.6 million net tons, bringing in revenues of around $19.2 billion as opposed to the anticipated $19.37 billion, with an adjusted EBITDA of roughly $775 million. When factoring in Stelco, the pro-forma adjusted EBITDA for 2024 is predicted to be approximately $1.2 billion. The company attributed its underwhelming performance, especially in the fourth quarter, to sluggish demand in North America.

news.headline: Trump administration considers shutting down Education Department in executive order, affecting education, student loan, and technology sectors. Significant move in line with campaign promise.
news.summary: The Trump administration is reportedly exploring executive actions to abolish the U.S. Department of Education, a move that could impact publicly traded companies in education, student loans, and technology. According to The Wall Street Journal, officials are considering an executive order to eliminate non-statutory functions and eventually dissolve the department completely. This move aligns with Trump's campaign pledge to reduce federal influence in education and delegate more authority to states. This development comes after an executive order issued on Jan. 25 by the administration. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tenaris reveals 2024 Q4 and annual results. Data in $, based on IFRS. Highlights include EBITDA, Free Cash Flow.
news.summary: The press release provides financial and operational details based on audited consolidated financial statements in US dollars, prepared following International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) by the International Accounting Standards Board and adopted by the European Union. In addition to IFRS measures, it includes non-IFRS alternative performance indicators such as EBITDA, Free Cash Flow, Net cash/debt, and Operating working capital days. Refer to exhibit I for further information on these alternative performance metrics.

news.headline: Litecoin's (LTC) price surged by 10% today, reaching a new all-time high of $300 due to increased buying interest.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%. This marks a decrease of 0.2% from the previous month and is the lowest rate seen in the past decade. The report also highlighted that the economy added a substantial 250,000 jobs in various sectors. Analysts attribute this positive trend to strong consumer spending and business investments. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a notable increase of 3.1% compared to last year. Overall, these latest figures indicate a robust and flourishing economy.

news.headline: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited announces Q4 2024 financial results, declaring $0.30 dividend per share, marking 22nd consecutive quarterly dividend.
news.summary: Genco announced a dividend of $0.30 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024, marking the company's 22nd consecutive quarterly dividend payout.

news.headline: Borr Drilling Limited reports $263.1 million in operating revenues for Q4 2024. Announced unaudited results.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on February 19, 2025, Borr Drilling Limited released its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The highlights include a total operating revenue of $263.1 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, showcasing an increase in their financial performance.

news.headline: Broadstone Net Lease shares Q4 and full year 2024 results in Victor, NY via Business Wire. #acquisitions
news.summary: Broadstone Net Lease has revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, based in Victor, New York, disclosed the key figures without specifying them in this report. The announcement was made through a Business Wire press release.

news.headline: Tutor Perini Corp to hold conference call on Feb 27, 2025, 2:00 PM PT to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results. Key speakers include CEO, EVP, and Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, February 27, 2025, at 2:00 PM PT to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Among the key speakers from Tutor Perini will be Gary Smalley, the CEO and President; Ryan Soroka, serving as the Executive Vice President and CFO; and Ronald Tutor, the Executive Chairman. Tutor Perini is a prominent construction firm specialized in civil, building, and specialty construction services.

news.headline: Builders FirstSource adds Cheryl Ainoa and Maria Renz to Board of Directors, effective March 1, 2025.Character count: 91
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) recently stated that Cheryl Ainoa, ex-Executive VP and Chief Technology Officer at Walmart Global Technology, and Maria Renz, VP and GM at Google, have been newly appointed to the company’s Board of Directors as of March 1, 2025. The company expressed excitement over the addition of Ainoa and Renz to the board, citing their notable leadership and extensive experience in e-commerce.

news.headline: Beverly Hills luxury resort secures $300M in new loan funding.
Capstone Association Management Becomes Part of the PMI Franchise Network in Sarasota, Florida
news.summary: Property management company, PMI Meridian Management, headquartered in Indianapolis, has recently acquired Capstone Association Management, a top association management firm in Sarasota, Florida. Following the acquisition, the company will operate under the new name PMI Capstone. This acquisition represents a notable expansion for PMI Meridian Management, establishing a presence in the Florida market and enhancing its standing in the association management sector. The move consolidates PMI Meridian's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: TeraWulf to discuss Q4 and year-end 2024 results during earnings call on Feb 28 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A financial report will be discussed during an earnings call scheduled for Friday, February 28 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will focus on the company's recent performance and is anticipated to attract a large audience to review important financial figures.

news.headline: Law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigates data breach affecting Pension Specialists Ltd. customers; suspicious activity detected on Feb. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a prominent national law firm specializing in class action cases, is currently conducting an investigation into allegations surrounding data privacy breaches impacting The Pension Specialists Ltd. ("TPS"). TPS became aware of potentially fraudulent activities around February 24, 2024. Individuals affected by this incident are encouraged to join the ongoing investigation led by Edelson Lechtzin LLP.

news.headline: Data breach at Innovative Renal Care investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for American Renal Management customers.
news.summary: A national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, revealed on February 19, 2025, that they are looking into allegations related to data privacy breaches at American Renal Management operating as Innovative Renal (IRC). IRC became aware of potential unauthorized access on its system on a specific date. The investigation is ongoing to determine the extent of the breach and the number of individuals impacted by the incident.

news.headline: Caesarstone to release Q4 and full year results on March 5, 2025; will host webcast and conference call at 8:30am ET.

news.headline: Laura Rutledge secures an exclusive deal with Bloomberg.
Cheesecake Factory Q4 2024: Total revenues $921.0m (up from $877.0m in 2023), net income $41.2m, diluted net income per share $0.83.
news.summary: In Calabasas Hills, California, The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) released their financial report for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, ending on December 31, 2024. The total revenues for the quarter were $921.0 million, indicating growth from $877.0 million in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2023. The net income for the quarter stood at $41.2 million with a diluted net income per share of $0.83. Additionally, the Company recorded pre-tax net expenses.
